title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cashfree - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
